description: Task sizing and effort estimation: S/M/L/XL classes with concrete anchors, reference-class calibration against work actually completed, uncertainty multipliers for unknowns, split triggers for oversized work, and estimate-vs-actual tracking that feeds retrospectives. Includes /estimation:size.

Codex fidelity: 1 faithful, 1 degraded, 0 dropped surface(s).
